synopsis: Collects Star Wars: Underworld – The Yavin Vassilika (2000) #1-5; Free Comic Book Day: Star Wars 2013; Star Wars: Empire (2002) #5-6, 8-13, 15; Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron (1995) #½; Star Wars: A New Hope – The Special Edition (1997) #1-4; Star Wars: Tag and Blink Are Dead (2001) #1; Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope (2001) #1-4; The Star Wars (2013) #0-8; material from Star Wars Tales (1999) #1-2, 4, 6, 8-10, 12, 14, 16, 19-20. The addition of “The Star Wars” (an adaptation of Lucas’s original script) differentiates this from the Epic line
title: Star Wars Legends: The Empire Omnibus Vol. 4
